name: Apple Breakfast Bread
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Melted Butter or Butter Substitute
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, baking powder, and salt. Cut in the shortening until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
2. Gradually add the brown sugar and milk, stirring with a fork until the dough comes together.
3. Stir in the beaten egg.
4. Pour the batter into an ungreased 13x9 inch pan.
5. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
6. Arrange apples in rows on top of the batter, leaving some space between each apple.
7. Sprinkle the cinnamon and brown sugar mixture over the apples.
8. Bake for 20 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. Serve warm.
